calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-03-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Pro Tem Judge: Cary Gold, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR. Joe Vickstein.
Arnold Evje, II, Esq., for Plaintiff James Whelan also present.
Defendants, Sean Currey and Leslie Clough present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation, read into the record as follows: Pay to stay back rent in the amount of $4,500.00 payable as follow:
$480.00 to be paid today July 3, 2003 and the balance through installments of $900.00 starting on July 18, 2003 and every other Friday until paid in full.
If Defendant breaches, Plaintiff is entitled to a (future) judgment against the defendant for restitution and possession of the premises located at:
1501 Larkin St. #304, San Francisco, CA.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement inmediate issuance of writ, without stays,
If defendants comply, case will be dismissed with prejudice.
If defendant did not comply with the agreement, plaintiff may so state by ex parte declaration, with 24 hours notice to the defendant and make a motion for entry of judgment.
Defendants waive any right to set aside judgment or stay of execution or relief from forfeiture.
On the record: $480.00 in cash paid by defendants to plaintiff.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
